text: I am disappointed with the repeated delays in receiving my orders. This has occurred multiple times now, and I feel frustrated by the lack of communication on your end.
I can't believe how often it crashes! I've tried everything and it's still useless.

I would like to formally request a refund for my recent purchase. Unfortunately, the product did not meet my expectations and I believe it falls short of the claims made on your website. However, I cannot recall the exact details of my order, such as the order number or purchase date, which I hope will not impede this process.

I am encountering an issue where the software appears to freeze during a crucial operation, specifically when I attempt to save my work, yet I am unsure if this is due to a temporary glitch or something more significant. Is there a known issue with saving documents in this version?

Hello team, I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to inquire whether the pro plan is available for billing on a monthly basis or if it is solely billed on a yearly basis, as I have seen differing information regarding this matter.
